description: Brand-by-fuel breakdown of registered passenger cars, sorted by count. Use when user asks which brands are most electric/diesel/petrol or compares fuel mix across brands.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 80
